title: Complete paper trading validation (4 weeks)
description: Run full system on paper account. Target: Sharpe >1.0, max drawdown <10%, win rate >50%. Document all issues.

title: Build OHLCV data collector (1m, 5m, 1h for BTC/ETH)
description: Collect candlestick data from IBKR. Backfill historical + stream real-time. Store in Convex. Validate data quality.
close_reason: Completed: ohlcv_collector.py with backfill, streaming, validation, aggregation

title: Setup Qdrant for pattern matching
description: Store market pattern embeddings. Find similar historical patterns for context. Optional enhancement for RL features.

title: Phase 3: RL Infrastructure Epic
description: Reinforcement learning for position sizing: Gymnasium env, PPO training, walk-forward validation. Weeks 5-6.

title: Build performance drift detector (Sharpe degradation)
description: Monitor rolling Sharpe ratio. If drops below 0.5 for 2 weeks, trigger retrain alert. Statistical significance testing.

title: Deploy Convex schema (ohlcv, trades, taxLots, positions, etc.)
description:
Deploy the complete Convex schema. No IBKR needed - can start immediately. Defines data contract for entire system.

BLOCKED: Requires interactive login. User must run:
  cd /home/shreemulay/ai_projects/development/crypto-trading-bot
  npx convex login
  npx convex dev --once

Schema file ready at convex/schema.ts (330 lines)

title: Build HIFO matching algorithm
description: Highest In First Out: sell highest cost basis lots first to minimize taxes. Track remaining quantities per lot.

title: Execute live trading switch (10% capital)
description: After paper validation: switch to live with 00. Monitor closely. Scale only after 2 profitable weeks.

title: Create tax report generator (Form 8949 format)
description: Export CSV in IRS Form 8949 format: description, acquired date, sold date, proceeds, cost basis, gain/loss.

title: Create Gymnasium trading environment
description: Custom gym.Env for trading. State: OHLCV + indicators + position. Action: position size multiplier (0.5-2.0). Reward: risk-adjusted returns.

title: Add slippage model to backtesting
description: Model realistic slippage: base 5bps + size impact + volatility multiplier. Critical for realistic backtest results.

title: Implement position sizing calculator (2% risk per trade)
description: Calculate position size based on stop distance and 2% portfolio risk. Include Kelly criterion as optional enhancement.

title: Add per-wallet lot tracking (2025 IRS requirement)
description: Track lots per wallet/exchange separately. Cannot aggregate across wallets per new IRS rules.

title: Phase 7: Monitoring & Go-Live Epic
description: Dashboards, alerts, deployment, go-live. Week 12+.

title: Implement volatility regime overlay
description: Track ATR relative to 20-day average. High volatility (>2x): reduce position size 50%. Professional risk adjustment.

title: Build weekly P&L snapshot calculator
description: Calculate portfolio value, period returns, cumulative returns. Store in pnlSnapshots. Include Sharpe, max drawdown.

title: Phase 5: Continuous Learning Epic
description: Self-improving system: drift detection, auto-retrain, model versioning. Weeks 9-10.

title: Implement ADX indicator calculation
description: Calculate Average Directional Index with configurable period (default 14). Include +DI and -DI for direction. Use pandas-ta or implement from scratch.

title: Setup IBKR account + enable crypto trading via Paxos
description: Open IBKR account if needed, enable crypto via Paxos. Use paper trading account (port 7497) first. May take 1-3 days for approval.

title: Implement health monitoring (connection status, errors)
description: Monitor IBKR connection, data freshness, system resources. Log errors with context. Create /health endpoint for UptimeRobot.

title: Configure TWS Gateway for headless operation
description: Install TWS Gateway, configure for paper trading. Use IBC (IBController) for auto-login handling. Port 7497 for paper, 7496 for live.

title: Build CLI dashboard (real-time P&L, positions)
description: Terminal interface using Typer + Rich. Show positions, P&L, recent trades, alerts. Quick status checks.

title: Deploy to Hetzner VPS
description: Setup Hetzner CX22 in Ashburn. Install dependencies, configure systemd, setup IBC for TWS. UptimeRobot monitoring.

title: Add reinvestment ledger in Convex
description: Track all reinvestments: source profit, amounts allocated, execution status. Audit trail for tax purposes.

title: Build champion/challenger A/B testing framework
description: Run new model in shadow mode. Compare to champion on same signals. Promote only if 10%+ improvement with statistical significance.

title: Build capital gains calculator
description: Calculate realized gains/losses per disposal. Sum by tax year. Separate short-term and long-term.

title: Build win rate degradation detector
description: Monitor rolling win rate. If drops below 45% for extended period, trigger investigation. May indicate regime change.

title: Implement alert system (Discord webhook)
description: Send alerts to Discord: trade executions, errors, circuit breakers, drift warnings. Configurable severity levels.

title: Train PPO agent (Stable Baselines3)
description: Train PPO on historical data. Hyperparameter tuning. Save best model by validation Sharpe. Use TensorBoard logging.

title: Build web dashboard (Shadcn/ui, charts)
description: React dashboard with Shadcn/ui v4. Performance charts, position visualization, alert history. Optional enhancement.

title: Implement profit reinvestment calculator (20%)
description: When weekly profit positive: calculate 20% for reinvestment. Split 50/50 between crypto and gold.

title: Phase 4: Tax & Compliance Epic
description: Tax tracking: HIFO lot matching, tax-loss harvesting, Form 8949 export. Weeks 7-8.

title: Build ib_async connection wrapper with reconnection logic
description: Create robust IBKR connection class using ib_async. Handle disconnects, implement exponential backoff, heartbeat monitoring. Core of all API operations.
close_reason: Completed: ibkr_client.py with ib_async, reconnection, heartbeat monitoring

title: Add paper trading pessimistic mode
description: Simulate realistic conditions: add slippage, random order rejections, partial fills. Bridge gap between paper and live.

title: Implement IBKR API rate limiter
description: Respect IBKR limits: max 60 requests/10min for historical data, max 50 concurrent requests. Build into connection wrapper. Prevents IP soft-bans.
close_reason: Completed: rate_limiter.py with token bucket, IBKR limits (60/10min)

title: Create regime detector (ADX threshold switch)
description: Monitor ADX value, switch between trend-following and mean-reversion strategies. Threshold: 25 (configurable).

title: Build mean-reversion module (RSI + Bollinger Bands)
description: When ADX <25: RSI(14) <30 + price below BB lower = BUY. RSI >70 + price above BB upper = SELL.

title: Create TWS Gateway auto-restart script
description: IBKR forces daily reset. Use systemd + IBC to handle restarts. Monitor process, auto-restart on crash. Critical for 24/7 operation.

title: Add BTC/ETH correlation monitor
description: Track rolling correlation. When >0.9: treat as single position for risk purposes. Prevents over-concentration.

title: Implement trade outcome logger with regime fingerprint
description: Log every trade with market context: ADX, volatility, correlation, time features. Enable analysis of what conditions work.

title: Integrate RL with rule-based strategy
description: Rule-based generates signal (-1/0/+1). RL adjusts size (0.5-2.0x). Combined system for production.

title: Build paper trade execution via IBKR
description: Execute trades on IBKR paper account. Use limit orders preferred. Implement bracket orders (entry + stop + target).

title: Build trend-following module (EMA crossover)
description: When ADX >25: use EMA(12)/EMA(26) crossover for signals. Fast crosses above slow = BUY, below = SELL.

title: Implement auto-retrain trigger
description: When drift detected: queue retrain job. Use recent data. Validate before promoting. Automatic or human-approved.

title: Implement cost basis tracking (short/long term)
description: Track holding period. <365 days = short-term (ordinary income rates). >365 days = long-term (preferential rates).

title: Phase 6: Profit Management Epic
description: P&L tracking, reinvestment automation. Week 11.

title: Implement ATR-based stop-loss calculator
description: Set stop-loss at entry - (ATR * multiplier). Default multiplier: 2.0. Trails with price movement.

title: Implement automated tax-loss harvesting
description: Detect unrealized losses. Sell and immediately repurchase (no wash sale for crypto). Reset cost basis. Run weekly or on threshold.

title: Define action space (sizing multiplier 0.5-2.0)
description: Continuous action space. RL outputs multiplier applied to rule-based position size. Constrained to safe range.

title: Implement tax lot creation on trade execution
description: Every BUY creates a tax lot with acquisition date, cost basis (including fees), quantity. Store in Convex taxLots table.

title: Create exchange precision/rounding module
description: Handle IBKR/Paxos specific precision: BTC min qty 0.0001, price tick 0.01. ALWAYS round DOWN quantities. Critical to prevent order rejections.
close_reason: Completed: precision.py with BTC/ETH specs, Decimal rounding, validation

title: Implement capital scaling auto-adjustment
description: Adjust position sizes, min trade amounts, and risk parameters as capital grows. K vs 0K require different configs.

title: Phase 2: Core Strategy Epic
description: Trading strategy implementation: ADX regime filter, trend following, mean reversion, backtesting. Weeks 3-4.

title: Build BTC/ETH purchase executor (10% of reinvest)
description: Execute crypto purchases for reinvestment. Equal split BTC/ETH or configurable. Use limit orders.

title: Create VectorBT backtest framework
description: Backtest strategy on historical data. Include realistic costs (0.3% round-trip minimum). Walk-forward validation.

title: Build startup state reconciliation
description: On every bot startup: sync positions from IBKR, check for orphaned orders, validate against local state. HALT if mismatch detected.

title: Phase 1: Foundation Epic
description: Foundation layer: IBKR setup, Convex schema, data pipeline, health monitoring. 2-week target.

title: Implement walk-forward validation pipeline
description: Rolling window: train on N months, validate on M months, step forward. Prevents overfitting to historical data.

title: Implement Sharpe-based reward function
description: Reward = risk-adjusted return. Include Sharpe, Sortino components. Penalize drawdown. Prevent reward hacking.

title: Define state space (OHLCV, indicators, position)
description: State features: ADX, RSI, volatility, drawdown, correlation, position, cash. Normalize for training stability.

title: Add wash sale warning for IAUM ETF
description: IAUM is a security (not crypto). Subject to wash sale rules. Warn if selling at loss within 30 days of purchase.

title: Build IAUM ETF purchase executor (10% of reinvest)
description: Execute gold ETF purchases. Respect wash sale rules. Schedule during market hours.

title: Add model versioning in Convex
description: Track all model versions: training params, validation metrics, live performance. Enable rollback if new model underperforms.

title: Add flash crash circuit breaker
description: Independent of indicators: if BTC drops >5% in 1min or >10% in 5min, emergency liquidate all positions. Real-time price monitoring.
close_reason: Completed: circuit_breaker.py with flash crash (5%/1min, 10%/5min), 15% drawdown limit
